title: Pure Darkness
description: A true darkness resource pack for brave miners !
body:
## Pure Darkness

Pure Darkness is a resource pack designed to make Minecraft’s darkness feel real. Nights become significantly darker, and caves plunge into true, near-total darkness, forcing you to rely on torches and other light sources to navigate the world.

This pack is perfect for players looking for a more immersive and challenging experience, where exploring at night or venturing underground requires preparation and caution.

![Pure Darkness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6df6a8a3b332a956edc2f923fc63f34c6eb90eb.jpeg)

### Features

- Darker nights that make the overworld more dangerous and atmospheric
- True darkness in caves, where unlit areas become almost completely black
- Light sources become essential for safe exploration
- Compatible with the Night Vision effect, so potions and commands still work normally
- Compatible with LambDynamicLights - Dynamic Lights, allowing held light sources to illuminate your surroundings
- Hardcore-style gameplay that increases the overall difficulty and tension

### Simple Installation

Pure Darkness is a resource pack, not a mod or datapack.
This means no mod loader, no additional files, and no complicated setup.

1. Download the pack
2. Move the .zip file into your resourcepacks folder
3. Enable it in the Resource Packs menu in Minecraft
4. That’s all you need to do.

### Compatibility

- Minecraft version: 1.21.11
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
- Fully compatible with the Night Vision effect
- Works with Dynamic Lighting features provided by supported mods or shaders

If you want Minecraft’s darkness to feel truly dark, Pure Darkness offers a simple way to make exploration more intense and rewarding.
